description: Using the 'food.gdt' dataset containing household food expenditure and income data, perform a joint linear hypothesis test on an OLS regression model with 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income' as the independent variable (including a constant). Test the joint hypothesis that the intercept (const) is equal to 80 and the slope (income) is equal to 10 simultaneously. Save the full test results, including the F-statistic and p-value, to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/joint_test_results.txt.
